test_sufficiency_summary: TacticalTests passed, but the new regression only covers synthetic FTacticalReportEvent input and misses the live FTacticalGame event-construction path where numeric ADF/MR payload is dropped.
documentation_accuracy_summary: DesignNotes.md describes exact structured-data ADF/MR rollups, but runtime FTacticalGame event conversion does not yet copy amount/previousValue/newValue into FTacticalReportEvent.
